title: Smiling Items
description: Utility Items now smile at the player :)
body:
# **General**

Simple resourcepack that does absolutely nothing but adds smiles to many utility items

# **Features**

Here is every feature added in detail
- Apples have small smiley faces drawn on them
- Golden Apples(enchanted or not) have smiley faces drawn on them
- All Buckets have smiles
- Ominous bottles and ominous keys have smiles carved out of their faces
- More faces coming soon

# **Instalation**

## **Default client**
If you are using the default launcher:
- Download the .zip file
- drag it into the resourcepack folder in the .minecraft directory (it should be ..AppData/Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks)
- Open the game and activate the pack

## **Mod client**
If you are using a mod launcher (modrinth, curseforge, ATLauncher) then install it from the launcher into the instance and then activate it ingame


# **Using the pack**

You may modify redistribute, or use the software however you desire given that you provide attribution to the original pack. When redistributing the redistribution must be fully open-source and have all changes made to the pack (if any) clearly stated. The source code must be provided upon redistribution and the redistributed copy must be liscenced under the GNU GPL (General Public Licence) v3.
